name: The midnight snack
description:
It's spring break. Your stepdaughter Mary-Ann is home from college and brought her roommate Ginger with her. Ginger starts flirting with you the moment she arrives, but you don't take it seriously until you find her naked in your kitchen at 2 AM.

(version 1.0.1 - testing through release)

TW - age gap, power imbalance
creator: The Real Tom Frost
